scripts.qa:anchor: rolldown qa/anchor-qa.ts -o qa/dist/anchor-qa.mjs --format esm && node qa/dist/anchor-qa.mjs
scripts.qa:scrap: rolldown qa/scrap-qa.ts -o qa/dist/scrap-qa.mjs --format esm --platform node && node qa/dist/scrap-qa.mjs
scripts.qa:session: rolldown qa/session-qa.ts -o qa/dist/session-qa.mjs --format esm --platform node && node qa/dist/session-qa.mjs
